No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to poverty eradication.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to ending hunger or improving nutrition.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to health and well-being.

Quality Education.reason: The course is a university-level elective, directly contributing to tertiary education (Target 4.3). It also explicitly prepares students with technical skills for 'software engineer' roles, aligning with Target 4.4 for employment.
evidence: 主管在面試軟體工程師時經常提出具體問題
培養數理資訊與科學計算之能力

Gender Equality.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to gender equality.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to water or sanitation.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course prepares students for 'software engineer' roles in the 'tech industry,' directly supporting productive employment (Target 8.5) and technological upgrading for economic productivity (Target 8.2).

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course on 'Algorithms' is fundamental to the 'AI era' and 'tech industry,' directly enhancing scientific research, technological capabilities, and innovation (Target 9.5, 9.b).
evidence: 我們身處在 AI 的時代
演算法無疑地扮演猶如經脈的角色

Reduced Inequalities.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to reducing inequalities.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to sustainable cities or communities.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: The emphasis on 'high-efficiency execution results' for algorithms implies more efficient use of computational resources, indirectly linking to Target 12.2 (efficient use of natural resources).
evidence: 一個「不複雜」的演算法，不只帶來高效率的執行結果

Climate Action.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to climate action.

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to marine life or oceans.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to terrestrial ecosystems or biodiversity.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to peace, justice, or institutions.

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course objective to 'cultivate teamwork' and use 'group projects' represents a micro-level form of partnership and knowledge sharing, aligning with the spirit of Target 17.16.
evidence: 在小組專案中實作應用
